prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a406ac07`.
codex_response:
Implemented `a406ac07` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: use the bottom row as a color-position template, and for each non-bottom row copy that row’s right-edge color into every bottom-row column where that same color appears, while preserving the original right-edge label. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples; no correction note was needed. The generator follows the tighter observed family from the source task: a single 10-cell run sequence is shared by the bottom row and the rightmost column, using 4 or 5 colors with short run lengths, so the samples stay visually on-distribution. No new shared primitive was necessary.

Code is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a406ac07/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a406ac07/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a406ac07/generator.py#L48). Artifacts were generated at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a406ac07/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a406ac07/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a406ac07/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a406ac07/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a406ac07/previews/preview_03.png).

Validation passed: official verifier `4/4`, generated-example verification `1000/1000`, and the preview sanity check looked consistent with the official task family.
